entry.title: Re: I update the little helper UI5 App to check if you received your badges
entry.content: Yes, searching for this tool. It really helped me last year.😊

entry.title: planning distribution on hierarchy date dimension
entry.content:
Hi all,

we use demand planning on monthly basis in SAP Analytics Cloud for planning. Whenever we input aggregated quantities on yearly basis, the values get distributed onto months (as it should be).

Problem here is the creation of decimal values (e.g. 1000 per year equals 83.33 per month). This does not make sense for the purpose of our planning and we only want to plan in integers

Currently the key figure is configurated as decimal number with 7 digits. Since the values are already existing, we can not change the key figure properties.

Is there a way to configure the the distribution in the hierarchical structure to only input integers?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Techtoberfest 2024
entry.content:
My desk 🙂

As you can see, music during developing is important to me. Even more important than a second screen 😄
Although this is not Petoberfest, two trustworthy debugger ducks sit under my screen.
My deskmat's colors don't quite fit the rest, but it's also only a temporary old one I had put there so my keyboard isn't that loud - I recently switched to my first mechanical one.

entry.title: Error in SAP Build apps Build service 4.11.167
entry.content:
I suddenly get an error when trying to make a web build in SAP Build apps. I then tried to Build an older app that I havent touched since I created it and it gives the same error message. I cant make any Build at the moment. I am using the Community edition. I have searched the forum and found others getting the same error message but not any solutions except not making copies of an app but instead saving them as new projects. I cant see that I have that option in the Community edition.Tried to make a build with an app that I know is not copied but it does not work either. Please help! Thanks!

 

AB version: 2.13.4
COMMAND: 

NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=12240 NEXT_SUPPORT_RELATIVE_PATHS=true USER_METERING_ENABLED=true SHOW_SUBSCRIPTION_VERIFICATION_NOTIFICATION=false SUBSCRIPTION_VERIFICATION_NOTIFICATION_DISMISSIBLE=true  npxrnv export -p web -s standalone -c standalone --ci --yes --skipRnvCheck --packageManager yarn --template @sapappgyver/orchestra-template-standalone@4.11.167 -r 

FAILED with ERROR: 

Command failed with exit code 1: npx rnv export -p web -s standalone -c standalone --ci --yes --skipRnvCheck --packageManager yarn --template @sapappgyver/orchestra-template-standalone@4.11.167 -r

entry.title: Re: Purchase a KIT, Explode into Components upon GR
entry.content: Hi I have the same issue for one of my customer that in addition wants that his MRP create PR on the kit but the kit is not in the production BOM only the components... Did you find a solution?

entry.title: Re: Request for free lecture materials and certification
entry.content: To subscribe in the learning hub is very expensive to get the materials & the certification exam as it costs 1400 $ approximately!

entry.title: Re: How can I prevent materials with the deletion flag fr...
entry.content: Thanks! If we want to achieve this, do we need to use "Information Lifecycle Management"? The first step, we need to finish ILM Configuration, right?

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA – New improvements in App Support
entry.content: The Support Component mentioned on the Fiori app reference library is CA-FLP-ABA.

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA – New improvements in App Support
entry.content:
@MohiniPurandare Is it possible to extend the UI of the App Support tool to add custom fields?

I tried with an adaptation project on BAS, but could not find this app in the dropdown.

entry.title: Backing up CALM config when doing a system refresh (on-premise)
entry.content:
Hi

 

We're new SAP Cloud ALM (CALM) users and are about to do our 1st refresh of a system which currently has CALM configured. The source system does not yet have CALM setup - only the target (test) system.

The information at Setup for SAP S/4HANA and SAP Business Suite - System Refresh  suggests we run /SDF/CALM_SYS_REFRESH however this is not available on our ERP 6.0 EHP7 system. The page lists the tables to "save and restore" without suggesting an approach. Would the correct approach be to create a transport with SE09?

For your information I've read the following pages:

3310685 - SAP Cloud ALM tables that needs to be backed up when refreshing the managed system 

What tables need to be backed (and restored) up for SAP Cloud ALM when doing on-prem system refresh? 

 

Thanks

 

Gavin

entry.title: Re: The Love-Hate Relationship with Networking
entry.content:
That is a great advice @ChandraKnabel "to make others feel comfortable" - I like that! 😀
Thanks for sharing and thanks for raising this topic @FHeyne. I also noticed especially after Covid, that it's more difficult ... like we were all not able to socialize anymore after years of sitting in virtual meetings 😅

entry.title: SAP DM: An error occurred while activating shop floor elements
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

When i try to deploy an shop floor element in SAP DM, sometimes i got this error message while DM attempts to activate the deployment in the Production Connector:

Failed
Message: An error occurred while activating shop floor elements. Cannot invoke "java.util.UUID.toString()" because "response.SubscriptionID" is null

Until today, im didn't find any solution on the internet and a possible workaround is to remove the deployment completely and create new one. 

Im trying to deploy a MQTT subscription to a on premise Production Connector. The Connection between Production Connector and MQTT Broker works fine.

I hope anyone have an idea.

Best regards

Andre

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Techtoberfest 2024
entry.content: Did you also post your giraffes to Petoberfest?

entry.title: Re: Maintenance Service Order in SAP S/4HANA 2022
entry.content: Is parallel operation of Customer Service as a compatibility scope component installed on the SAP S/4HANA and SAP S/4HANA Service with Advanced Execution with Item-based accounting possibel?

entry.title: Re: TM FSD PROCESSING
entry.content:
Hi,

check these notes: 

2764695 - Frachtabrechnung bleibt im Status \"Buchung gestartet\" für SAP Transportation Management hängen - SAP for Me

Guided Answers (sap.com)

2877999 - Buttons in Freight settlement - SAP for Me

Br, Ronald

entry.title: Unable to extend E_JournalEntryItem with association
entry.content:
To be able to add custom fields to the I_JournalEntryItem CDS view, we're given the E_JournalEntryItem view entity. However in our case I need to extend it with a new association. I thought this would be simple enough, but but setting up the correct link to the custom CDS will not work.

 

I have a custom CDS view, which needs to be linked to every JournalEntryItem. The logical link would then of course be the AccountingDocument. It is part of the E_JournalEntryItem entity... but not permitted. These key fields are used to uniquely link it to a I_JournalEntryItem record.

define view entity E_JournalEntryItem
  as select from acdoca as Persistence
{
  key Persistence.rldnr  as SourceLedger,
  key Persistence.rbukrs as CompanyCode,
  key Persistence.gjahr  as FiscalYear,
  key Persistence.belnr  as AccountingDocument,
  key Persistence.docln  as LedgerGLLineItem
}

Tried to link it using the Persistence.belnr field as an alternative, but no go.

And of course simply naming it AccountingDocument does not work either, it has to be a full qualified expression.

That leaves be out of ideas. How can I extend the I_JournalEntryItem with a new association based on AccountingDocument?

Using the 'Custom Fields' app does not give me enough flexibility in populating the value, so that's not a viable alternative.

entry.title: Re: Missing Sort buttons in SAP_EHS_1022_032 (Hazard Indu...
entry.content:
Hi Gernot,

On our S4HANA ON PREMISE 2022 Initial Shipment Stack the buttons are still there below the table:

I currently don't have access to a 2023 release....

Kind Regards

Mark

entry.title: Re: How to produce JSON with hyphenated field members in a Receiver with the REST Adapter
entry.content: Alas, my calls for help have been an unheard cry in the night, the echoes of pain bouncing only back unto my own ears.

entry.title: Re: Bring Open-Source Text Embedding Models into SAP AI Core with Infinity
entry.content:
@Akaay,

llama 3.1 models family is for text generation, not for text embedding purpose. 

Here list some text embedding available in ollama.

  1. nomic-embed-text
  2. hellord/mxbai-embed-large-v1

Once the embedding model pulled in ollama in SAP AI Core, then you can access the embedding api through endpoint: /v1/api/embed. Please refer to ollama's Generate Embedding API for detail.

entry.title: Asset depreciation of residual value
entry.content:
Dear all,

we are using SAP ECC system for the Asset accounting. We purchased an asset for acquisition value of 10000 EUR and useful life of 5 years with asset value date 01.01.2024. We posted an unplanned depreciation value of 3000 EUR. 

In the tab Asset comparison of the Asset Explorer, the ordinary value is calculated based on the acquisition value.

Fiscal yearAcquisition valueOrdinary valueUnplanned Net book value
202410000200030005000
2025 2000 3000
2026 2000 1000
2027 1000  
2028    

Is it possible to make the residual value of 7000 (acquisition - unplanned) is depreciated with equal amount for all the years? with which depreciation key? or which base method to use? 

Fiscal yearAcquisition valueOrdinary valueUnplanned Net book value
202410000175030005250
2025 1750 3500
2026 1750 1750
2027 1750  
2028    

Thanks a lot for your kind support.

Best regards, 

Chiachen

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello 

I am interested & I fall under the category of women & career shifting mid aged.

Thank you!

entry.title: PDM Newsletter GROW with SAP - October 2024
entry.content:
Welcome to the GROW with SAP Newsletter

We are thrilled to bring you the GROW with SAP Newsletter, your essential source for keeping up with the latest insights, trends, and innovations in the world of SAP. Each issue is carefully curated to provide you with expert advice, success stories, and practical content aimed at empowering you expand your skills and thrive in the dynamic SAP landscape.

Whether you're eager to dive into new technologies or seeking tailored knowledge, our newsletter is your one-stop destination. We also encourage you to share this valuable resource with your colleagues andbecome an active member of our thriving community.

Thank you for your unwavering support! If you have any thoughts or inquiries, please don't hesitate to reach out. We're dedicated to helping you maximize your Grow with SAP experience.

Stay engaged, stay informed, and subscribe today by sending your details to beatriz.mata@sap.com

Let's grow together!

 

Beatriz Mata Chacón

beatriz.mata@sap.com 

Partner Delivery Manager EMEA South

SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Ecosystem Delivery Success | Partner Ecosystem Success

 

Top Highlights

Overview

       Register/Access

SAP Enterprise Cloud Services – Partner Summit 2024 (EMEA/MEE)

SAP Enterprise Cloud Services Partner Summit 2024' is a virtual summit to empower our SAP PartnerEdge, Sell and SAP PartnerEdge, Service partners. It will be scenario-based training comprised of some of the topics listed below.

            Register

 

  • Session: 15th October 2024
    09:00 AM to 12:00 PM CET

 

  • Session: 16th  October 2024
    09:00 AM to 11:30 PM CET

 

Highlights of the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 Release

The second major release of the year 2024 is here! The SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 release is filled with innovations that boost your productivity and support your everyday work life.

We are thrilled to give you further insights on our fully-fledged cloud ERP, supporting your journey to the intelligent, sustainable enterprise in this blog post.

 

          Access

Webinar: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Implementation Essentials for Finance

Welcome to the implementation essentials event by expertise services on the topic of finance. This session is to support project teams preparing for, or involved in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition implementations.

This is a 3-day event, each day is 2.5 hours, and will include the following topic areas related to the finance line of business:

  • Key finance implementation decisions will be discussed (ledger/parallel accounting/chart of accounts/fiscal year variant/currencies)
  • Update to date major innovations included (financial accounting/management accounting/financial operations/cash/group reporting/closing/AI etc.)
  • Presenters will share implementation experience and lessons learned

         Register

  • Session 1: 15th October 2024, 9:00 AM to 11:30 AM Europe/Amsterdam
  • Session 2: 16th October 2024, 9:00 AM to 11:30 AM Europe/Amsterdam
  • Session 3: 17th October 2024, 9:00 AM to 11:30 AM Europe/Amsterdam

Partner Learning Series: Optimizing SAP Portfolio in the Public Sector

The Partner Learning Series is tailored to elevate the learning experiences of our partners seeking to maximize the use of the SAP Portfolio in the Public Sector. Our on-demand sessions, each lasting approximately 20 minutes, provide a deeper understanding of transitioning government customers to the Cloud in collaboration with experienced industry experts. You'll have the flexibility to learn at your own pace about SAP's Strategy, priorities, and trends, including SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP) and cloud deployment options.

The series delves into SAP S/4HANA Cloud, RISE with SAP, GROW with SAP, and SAP Business AI within the Public Sector industry, with a focus on grants and funds management, SAP SuccessFactors HCM, sourcing and procurement, and citizen services. Join us as we explore new insights and strategies to drive success in the Public Sector.

        Access

 

 

 

Events and Webinars for Partners

Overview

    Register/Access

Webinar: New resource-related intercompany billing in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

New resource-related Intercompany Billing in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition is the successor of old resource-related Intercompany Billing. This live session will provide a comprehensive overview and describe the key differentiating capabilities compared to the predecessor from a functional point of view.

     Register

  • Session 1: 1st October 2024, 10:00 AM - 11:00 AM Europe/Berlin
  • Session 2: 1st October 2024, 4:00 PM - 5:00 PM Europe/Berlin

Webinar: GROW with SAP with Concur Expense – deep-dive session

Discover the exciting opportunity we now have to offer the value of Concur Expense to our GROW with SAP premium customers. During this session we will cover:

  • GROW with SAP w/Concur entitlement & Concur partner programs
  • Concur Expense product overview and SAP S/4HANA w/Expense value prop
  • Integration and implementation
  • The opportunity and next steps

 

     Register

  • Session 1: 3rd October 2024, 09:00 AM - 10:00 AM Europe/Berlin
  • Session 2: 3rd October 2024, 5:00 PM - 6:00 PM Europe/Berlin

Webinar: Explore GROW with SAP entitlements - SAP Analytics Cloud for planning

SAP Analytics Cloud is the one planning solution combining business intelligence, augmented analytics, and built-in collaboration tools for everyone to work together and make faster, confident decisions. Learn more about them in this session

     Register

  • Session 1: 4th October 2024,  12:00 AM - 13:00 AM SGT

Webinar: SAP Supply Chain Management for GROW with SAP

This session will provide you with an overview of GROW with SAP, and how SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition helps companies with the embedded Supply Chain Management capabilities. The focus of the session is to introduce the complementing solutions from the SAP Supply Chain Management portfolio. These solutions integrate with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and provide a perfect upsell opportunity for customers who have specific requirements in Supply Chain Management processes. You will learn about how to position these solutions in the GROW with SAP context, and about customer success stories.

     Register

 

  • Session 1: 7th October 2024, 4:00 PM GMT - 5:00 PM Europe/Berlin

 

 

Webinar: Introduction to SAP Information Lifecycle Management (SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Hot Topic Series)

During this session our experts will provide insights on the "Why" and "How" of SAP Information Lifecycle Management. We will discuss possible use-cases and provide an overview of features and functions. Additionally, we will showcase the differences between SAP ILM in an SAP S/4HANA on-prem or private cloud deployment vs. an SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition deployment.  For example, you will learn about the SAP ILM advisor which provides guidance for the data volume aspect of SAP ILM and get to know about archive file storage infrastructure. 

 

     Register

  • Session 1: 8th October 2024,  10:00 AM - 11:00 AM Europe/Amsterdam

 

Webinar: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Data Migration Fundamentals

In this workshop, you will gain fundamental knowledge on the data migration workstream in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition based on SAP Activate methodology.

 

This workshop will start with an introduction to the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Expertise Services Community, and we will take you through the fundamental aspects of data migration and the migration cockpit for SAP S/4HANA Cloud.

It will introduce the migration cockpit, data readiness, cutover as using the 3 system landscape for your data migration workstream. In the end we will also share some lessons learned on data migration and provide some space for question and answers.

 

     Register

  • Session 2: 8th October 2024, 04:00 PM - 05:30 PM CET

Webinar: Expand the value of GROW with SAP with add-on packages for chief financial officer, chief supply chain officer and chief human resources officer

In this session we will review currently offered GROW with SAP packages in financial management, digital supply chain and human resources. We will update you on the changes since the packages were launched earlier this year. You will also have an opportunity to ask questions.

      Register

  • Session: 9th October 2024, 09:00 AM - 10:30 AM CET

 

Webinar: SAP Project and Resource Management for GROW with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition (deep dive)

After the training you will know how SAP Project and Resource Management integrates with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Professional Services scenario. How project staffing is done, which apps are provided and the key capabilities. Further you will learn which integration scenarios are available and how to proceed to setup your integration scenario..

       Register

  • Session 1: 9th October 2024, 02:30 PM - 05:00 PM Asia/Singapore

 

Webinar: Explore GROW with SAP Entitlements – SAP Ariba Buying, SAP Ariba Central Invoice Management

GROW with SAP entitlements offer support for customers looking to quickly and predictably adopt cloud ERP with continuous innovation. SAP Ariba Buying, base edition creates a smart and simple purchasing experience that increases user engagement. SAP Ariba Central Invoice Management on SAP Business Technology Platform is seamlessly integrated to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and provides a single point of access and visibility to supplier invoices from multiple connected systems. Learn more about them in this session

 

       Register

  • Session 1: 9th October 2024, 12:00 PM - 01:00 PM Asia/Singapore

Webinar: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Integration & Extensibility Fundamentals

In this interactive webinar, you will gain understanding on aspects & capabilities of Integration & Extensibility within SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. This webinar will start with an introduction to the SAP S/4HANA Cloud expertise services community, outlining the importance Integration & Extensibility in SAP Activate methodology, integration types and extensibility types – followed with an opportunity to interact and raise questions.

       Register

  • Session 1: 28th October 2024, 04:00 PM CET - 05:30 PM CET

Webinar: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Implementation Essentials for Sourcing & Procurement 

Welcome to the Implementation Essentials event by Expertise Services on the topic of Sourcing & Procurement. This session is to support Partner project teams preparing for or involved in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition implementations.

        Register

  • Session 1: 23rd October 2024, 3:00 PM - 5:00 PM Europe/Amsterdam
  • Session 2: 24th October 2024, 3:00 PM - 5:00 PM Europe/Amsterdam

 

Transformation with S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

Overview

    Register/Access

Find Release Information & Content with the Release Navigator for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 

Join us for an interactive virtual live session where we’ll walk you through the features and benefits of the Release Navigator. Discover how this tool provides a comprehensive view of upcoming releases, allowing you to easily plan and prepare for updates. You’ll also learn how to find release scheduling and maintenance windows within the release navigator, enabling you to better plan for and manage the deployment of updates.

 

       Access

Advanced Solution Bundling for Solution Order Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

 

Check out the latest blog post on our newsletter about the new features introduced in Solution Order Management with the rollout of the 2402 release of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. This update supports the transition towards solution-based business models, offering a broad scope and range of customizable offerings. Find out more about how these business models drive competitive advantage and how the new solution bundles functionality in the 2402.3 release enables more efficient selling and processing of holistic solutions. Don't miss out on this insightful read.

 

       Access

Transportation Management for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408

Don't miss out on the latest product updates for Transportation Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408! We are thrilled to introduce the integration of Returns Purchase Orders with Transportation Management, enabling you to seamlessly perform transportation planning, monitor execution, and settle freight costs for returns purchase orders as part of the Return to Supplier process (scope item BMK). Stay tuned for more details on these exciting features.

 

       Access

 

 

Enterprise Portfolio and Project Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408

Discover the latest innovations in Enterprise Portfolio and Project Management with the release of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408. Our blog post outlines key topics, including reserving material using project demand (4RF), creating a project by copying an existing project using an API (1NT, 1YF), and integration with Project Plan Collaboration (6JN). Stay updated and explore how these innovations can elevate your project management experience.

 

       Access

 

 

 

Artificial Intelligence & Technology in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 

Check out the latest blog post on Artificial Intelligence and Technologies, highlighting the newest features in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Release 2408. Our release introduces a diverse range of AI-driven functionalities that are designed to elevate user experience, enhance operational efficiency, and foster better decision-making. With features such as Joule, AI-assisted financial insights, and intelligent resource matching, SAP S/4HANA Cloud Release 2408 promises to optimize your business operations, making them more intuitive, accurate, and efficient. We extend our utmost appreciation to our dedicated developers for their hard work and commitment

 

        Access

SAP Recommendation: Assignment of Corporate Accounting Principle to Ledger

Check out our latest blog post, which provides guidance on the SAP Recommendation for assigning Corporate Accounting Principles to the Ledgers for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition (Public Cloud). The blog explains each scenario, outlines the future impacts if the recommendation is not followed, and discusses when it is possible to change the Corporate Accounting Principal assignment. Gain valuable insights into best practices for efficient Corporate Accounting Principal assignment in SAP S/4HANA Cloud. 

       Access

Other Updates

Overview

   Register/Access

Deep insights on embedded launch activities for RISE with SAP customers

This session can provide the clear understanding of the onboarding process of RISE with SAP customers as well as the embedded launch activities process, documentations, resources and interlock with SAP Activate methodology

 

    Replay

Explore Generative AI Hub with SAP AI Core and SAP AI Launchpad

SAP AI Core is a service in the SAP Business Technology Platform that helps customers and partners deploy and run AI models at scale without compromising data privacy and cost-effectiveness. It provides seamless integration with SAP solutions and any AI scenario can be easily realized using open-source frameworks

    Access

SAP Signavio Lab Space - Business Process Transformation Innovation

Discover the power of SAP Signavio Lab Space and learn how this innovation platform can contribute to a better SAP Signavio. This webcast will showcase how you can effectively engage with the platform and explore its experimental features. 

         Register

  • Session: 22th October 2024
    04:00 PM CEST

entry.title: SAP Disclosure Management errors in taxonomy mapping (xbrldie:PrimaryItemDimensionallyInvalidError)
entry.content:
Hi guys,

I created the process for XBRL in Colombia (https://www.superfinanciera.gov.co/publicaciones/10084416/taxonomias-10084416/) to public entities (260).

I loaded the taxonomy in SAP DM, configurated the process, mapping each concept in XBRL MAPPER but when I try validated the XBRL file in regulatory site, I have some issues, for exemple:

2024-09-27 15:15:34,989 [xbrldie:PrimaryItemDimensionallyInvalidError] Fact ifrs1:ExplanationOfRevaluationMethodsAndAssumptionsPropertyPlantAndEquipment context A01D_CarryingAmountAccumulatedDepreciationAmortisationAndImpairmentAndGrossCarryingAmountAxis_GrossCarryingAmountMember_ClassesOfPropertyPlantAndEquipmentAxis_LandMember_0 dimensionally not valid - XBRL Instance.xbrl 42961

Here in this line (42961) I have this mapping:

 <ifrs1:ExplanationOfRevaluationMethodsAndAssumptionsPropertyPlantAndEquipment contextRef="A01D_CarryingAmountAccumulatedDepreciationAmortisationAndImpairmentAndGrossCarryingAmountAxis_GrossCarryingAmountMember_ClassesOfPropertyPlantAndEquipmentAxis_LandMember_0">ver nota 2.17 en pdf</ifrs1:ExplanationOfRevaluationMethodsAndAssumptionsPropertyPlantAndEquipment>

This mapping is the table 822100, line 17 and all mapping for dimensions is ok. All line above has the same mappings in dimension, but only the line 17 has problems in validation.

 

In sheet DM_Variables is correct the mapping:

ifrs:ExplanationOfRevaluationMethodsAndAssumptionsPropertyPlantAndEquipmentver nota 2.17 en pdf5 ifrs:ClassesOfPropertyPlantAndEquipmentAxis|ifrs:LandMember||ifrs:CarryingAmountAccumulatedDepreciationAmortisationAndImpairmentAndGrossCarryingAmountAxis|ifrs:GrossCarryingAmountMemberI   

Another point is that this line start with "ifrs 1:" and finish with "_0". Others that is corrects start with "ifrs" and not include the "_ 0".

I have this problems in anothers reports/lines, with same behavior.

Someone had the same problem and can share with me as resolve it?

Regards,

Felipe

SAP Disclosure Management

entry.title: Understanding and Managing Transport Requests in SAP Central Business Configuration (CBC)
entry.content:
What is a Transport Request?

A transport request is a mechanism in SAP that facilitates the movement of changes made in one system to another. In the case of CBC, transport requests are automatically generated when deploying a workspace. These requests document all modifications, allowing for a structured approach to change management.

Identifying CBC Transport Requests

When you deploy your workspace from CBC, the system creates transport requests categorized as CBC type. These requests capture essential changes, including:

  • Scoping adjustments
  • Organizational unit modifications
  • Business configuration content updates

Finding CBC Transport Requests

To locate and manage these transport requests, follow these steps:

  1. Access the Export Customizing Transports App: This app provides a centralized interface for managing transport requests.

  2. Filter by Request Type: Use the "Type" option to specifically filter for requests labeled as "SAP Central Business Configuration." This will help you focus on relevant transport requests.

  3. Check Task Status: Ensure that all tasks associated with the CBC requests have a "released" status. Only requests in this state can be processed further.

Handling CBC Transport Requests

Taking Ownership of a Request

To manage a CBC transport request, you can take ownership by clicking the Assign To Me button. This grants you the necessary permissions to release the request once all associated tasks are complete.

Releasing Customizing Requests

You can release customizing requests using the Export Customizing Transports app. It’s important to note that all tasks within requests of type CBC are automatically released after implementation, ensuring a smooth transition of changes.

Monitoring CBC Staging Status

Transport requests of type Central Business Configuration are linked to a CBC Staging ID. To check the staging status and gather related information, select Display CBC Staging in the transport request overview. This will direct you to the CBC staging area, providing more detailed insights.

If you encounter issues during staging, such as errors or activation failures, it’s essential to report an incident under the component X4-CBC-CW for assistance.

Important Notes

  • No Task Creation: For CBC type requests, task creation is not permitted.
  • Release Requirement: All tasks within a CBC transport request must have a "released" status before proceeding. If any tasks are not released, please report an incident under X4-CBC-CW.

entry.title: Unlock New Horizons in Automation by Upgrading to SAP Build Process Automation Agent 3
entry.content:
Let’s dive into why Agent 3 is a game-changer in your Automation journey and why the timing to upgrade has never been more important.

 

Agent 3: A Leap in Performance and Functionality

Since its release two years ago, SAP Build Process AutomationAgent 3 has undergone continuous innovation. Here are some of the latest standout features and enhancements that make Agent 3 indispensable

  • Simplified Deployment and Version Management: Agent 3 offers a seamless deployment experience with direct download from tenant, easier installation, and simplified registration processes. Managing different versions has never been easier, ensuring that your transition to Agent 3 is smooth and without disruptions on your productive environments.

 

  • Smart Automatic Upgrades: The smart Automatic Upgrade mechanism ensures that new versions of Agent 3 are deployed smoothly across your organization. You can configure specific agents as Early Adopters to validate newly released agent versions. This controlled deployment process minimizes risks and ensures that updates are thoroughly vetted by your IT Admins before an automatic full-scale roll-out to all your agents.

 

 

 

  • Offline Mode: Ensure uninterrupted job executions with our Offline mode. This feature allows Agent 3 to continue executing automation jobs even if it loses connectivity with the SAP Build Process Automation Tenant, providing you with resilience in critical scenarios.

 

  • Continuous Recording Log Traces : For advanced troubleshooting, Agent 3 includes continuous Log Tracing. This tool enables faster diagnosis and resolution of issues, combined with a powerful Screen Tester to ensure your automation executions are robust and error-free.

 

  • Microsoft Office 365 Connector: Automate tasks on Microsoft 365 Online applications (including SharePoint, OneDrive, Excel, Outlook and Teams) with our Microsoft 365 Cloud SDK. This new connector allows you to automate your use cases in environments where installing these applications isn’t possible.

 

  • Advanced Excel Automation: Agent 3 allows for the automation of various Excel activities without needing the Excel application installed on your machine. This expands the flexibility and capability of your task automation, especially in environments where installing applications is not possible.

 

  • Enhanced Google Integration: With the introduction of Google Workspace SDK, Google Doc AI and Google Vision AI SDKs, Agent 3 allows you to effortlessly automate tasks within Google’s ecosystem.

 

  • RDP Session Manager: Agent 3 introduces a Remote Desktop Protocol Session Manager, which enables seamless and secured automation across different environments without requiring physical access. This is particularly useful for complex setups involving multiple remote desktops. 

 

 

 

Elevating Your User Experience and Simplifying Automation Management

Agent 3 doesn’t just bring new features—it revolutionizes how you interact with it. The introduction of an enhanced user interface and streamlined experience makes building, deploying, and managing automations easier and more intuitive than ever. Despite its advanced capabilities, Agent 3 has been designed to be user-friendly, ensuring a citizen developer-friendly experience to build bots and run jobs effectively.

 

Why Upgrade Now?

Upgrading to Agent 3 is crucial for several reasons:

  • End of Maintenance for Agent 2: As of June 30, 2024, Desktop Agent 2 has reached its end of maintenance for SAP Build Process Automation. This means SAP can no longer provide support for any bugs or issues encountered with Agent 2. Additionally, the end of maintenance for Agent 2 within SAP Intelligent RPA is set for June 30, 2025. Continuing to use Agent 2 to run automation jobs poses potential risks and limited access to innovation.

 

  • Secure and Reliable Automation: By upgrading to Agent 3, you ensure that your automation environment remains fully supported, secure, and optimized with the latest features and quality improvements.

 

  • Harness the Power of New Capabilities: As listed above, Agent 3 offers a suite of new features, from enhanced integration options to powerful troubleshooting tools and user-friendly interfaces. The Agent 3 improvements not only increase the performance and stability of your automations but also significantly reduce the time and effort required for governance and maintenance of your agents. Our commitment to continuous improvement means that by upgrading, you’re not just getting a new version but a more robust tool that evolves with your organization needs.

 

A Milestone for Mac OS Users 

Last but not least, we’re thrilled to announce that SAP Build Process Automation Agent 3 will be available for Mac OS this October. This long-awaited release means you can finally build bots, deploy and run automation jobs natively on your Mac OS machine, eliminating the need for workarounds or virtual machines. This new capability not only enhances your ability to work within your preferred operating system but also broadens the accessibility of SAP Build Process Automation, allowing you to maximize your productivity.

 

Upgrade Today !

The time to upgrade is now. By transitioning to Agent 3, you will benefit from enhanced performance, new features, and continued support from SAP. With the upcoming Mac OS release, we’re expanding the possibilities, enabling everyone—regardless of platform—to fully leverage the power of Task Automation in SAP Build Process Automation. Don’t wait until it’s too late. Upgrade today and step into the future with SAP Build Process Automation Agent 3.

entry.title: Re: Error in SAP Build apps Build service 4.11.167
entry.content:
Hello

Exactly the same problem since yesterday.

I tried an old version (already deployed) and got the same issue.

I'm gonna open a SAP ticket.

entry.title: Re: Accessibility in SAPUI5
entry.content:
It is an underrated topic but important in the UX/UI world. 
Thank you for studied it!

entry.title: Re: Profit Center Group replication issue via IDoc
entry.content: I'm also facing same issue using in SOA service.

entry.title: Re: Welcome to the beginner corner!
entry.content:
Dear @David_Chaviano , My name is Syed Ossama Tahir Ali, and I am writing to express my interest in the SAP certification program offered through your digital skills initiative. I currently serve as a Production Planning Manager at Honda, where I have accumulated six years of experience in industrial manufacturing. Throughout my career, I have relied on Excel sheets and manual data entry systems, but recently, my company has begun implementing SAP with the assistance of external consultants. This transition has ignited my passion for learning SAP and enhancing my knowledge in this critical area.

I am eager to expand my skill set by gaining proficiency in SAP, particularly within the planning model, as I believe it will significantly benefit my professional growth and contribute to my company's operational efficiency. My functional and business expertise provides a solid foundation for grasping the intricacies of SAP, and I am confident that obtaining this certification will equip me with the tools necessary to drive improvements and innovation within my role.

As someone transitioning to SAP mid-career, I recognize the immense value that this certification would offer in helping me advance my professional journey. I am highly motivated to embrace this opportunity and believe that this program will serve as a crucial step in my continued development.

I would be grateful for your consideration of my application and look forward to the possibility of being a part of this transformative initiative.

entry.title: Re: can we use the same association for value help for tw...
entry.content: didn't I tell you? just do like the first one.

entry.title: Re: Custom field in service entry sheet Fiori App
entry.content: Is it a Onpremise fiori app or cloud?

entry.title: Custom roles in SAP Digital Manufacturing
entry.content:
Hi Community,

does anyone of you know if it is possible to create custom roles without templates for SAP Digital Manufacturing or if it is possible to assign/remove Apps to/from roles?

Thank you!

SAP Digital Manufacturing

entry.title: Re: How to list users group with sap bo rest api?
entry.content:
You can use cmsquery (http://<baseURL>/v1/cmsquery) and write the desired query in the body.

For information on using CMS query with RESTful API, see CMS Query

Example query:   

SELECT SI_ID, SI_NAME, SI_USERGROUPS FROM CI_SYSTEMOBJECTS WHERE SI_NAME='TestA' and 
SI_KIND = 'User'

 

SELECT SI_ID, SI_NAME, SI_USERGROUPS FROM CI_SYSTEMOBJECTS WHERE SI_KIND = 'UserGroup'

....

I hope this helps you get on the right track.

entry.title: Re: Bring Open-Source Text Embedding Models into SAP AI Core with Infinity
entry.content:
@jagdish_chandrasekaran,

For sentence-transformer,  as mentioned in Why Infinity section in its official github repo 

  • Deploy any model from HuggingFace: deploy any embedding, reranking, clip and sentence-transformer model from HuggingFace

For imgbeddings, it is technically feasible to custom an embedding API server with imgbeddings. Here is an example about how we can custom a transformer inference server in SAP AI Core for text generation. So, you can achieve the same for imgbeddings.

entry.title: Re: Direct Data Access to SAP Datasphere
entry.content: Additional notes: As stated in CDP's official documentation for EU, CDC support EU5 (Europe (Netherlands) - cf-eu20).

entry.title: Re: How to list users group with sap bo rest api?
entry.content: Thank you so much. I want to ask another question related this question. How can I remove a user from all user groups they belong to?

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2024 Contest Official Rules
entry.content: @robinthakral We load the registrations once a day.  I just did load today's a minute ago.

entry.title: SAP PO Error : Error while getting token and sign] in class com.sap.xi.tf
entry.content:
Hello Team,

In SAP PIPO we are getting Error while getting token and sign] in class com.sap.xi.tf._MM_Request_FEDummy_ method LookupTokenSign[wsfe, TrustedCAs, sap, 30710174586, SID_400, CC_RFC_RCV_GRC_ARG_DOM_Lookup, BC_WSAA, CC_SOAP_RCV_WSAA_ARG_DOM, com.sap.aii.mappingtool.tf7.rt.Context@25c63a24].

Due to this error we are unable to establish connection between SAP PO and Argentina govt invoices.

entry.title: ABAP MailOutput Content-Type:text/html; charset="us-ascii"Content-Transfer-Encoding:quoted-printable
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am getting the error like below and followed with unsupported characters of html tags when send from abap mail can any one have the solution for this its causing in random scenarios 

MIME-Version: 1.0
Importance: Normal
X-Priority: 3 (Normal)
X-Mailer: SAP NetWeaver 757
Content-Type: text/html;
 charset="us-ascii"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: quoted-printable
Content-Description: 

<=21DOCTYPEhtml><htmllang=3D=22en=22><head><metacharset=3D=22UTF-8=22><t=itle></title>==</head><body>=======<br/><br/>===<table>====<trstyle=3D=22text-align:right;=22><</tr>===<trstyle=3D=22t=ext-align:right;=22><th>CC:</th><thstyle=3D=22font-weight:normal;text-alig=n:left;=22>==</th></tr>===<trstyle=3D=22text=-align:right;=22><th>Subject:</th><thstyle=3D=22font-weight:normal;text-a=lign:left;=22><imgsrc=>==<br/><br/>===</body></html>

entry.title: SAP DI Pipeline getting failed intermittently
entry.content:
We are using SAP Data Intelligence to replicate data using SLT. While pipelines are running, randomly pipelines are getting failed with below error:

Error: failed to stop APE/Engine: abap: request failed: rc=1, msg=\"Message: An invalid handle 'RFC_CONNECTION_HANDLE' was passed to the API call\\nCode: RFC_INVALID_HANDLE 


DI connects to SAP S/4 through cloud connector.

entry.title: unable to release a work order-SAP PM
entry.content:
I am unable to release a PM work order.

Getting this message- Current status does not allow release

Order has a CSER status but I have also tried to release orders without CSER status and I get the same error message.

Message No. /DOW/PP_PM_MSG009

Please help sort this issue.

Thank you. PLM Enterprise Asset Management (EAM)/Plant Maintenance (PM) SAP EAM Work Order SAP ERP

entry.title: Mass Reject DCD
entry.content:
Hi All,

 

Currently to reject a DCD, I have to go inside a DCD using manage credit cases App and reject it. Do we have any app to mass reject DCDs ? I want to select all and click on Reject. We have this feature for Release and Recheck but strangely we do not have one to Reject. Attached a screenshot. Thank you.

 

Best regds

Subha

entry.title: Re: Customer fields involved in pricing determination
entry.content:
Hi,

the custom references stored in the customer would need to be copied to the subscription items in order to be considered in pricing. If you create subscriptions programmatically, you can read the customer master and add the custom references to the items when you call the subscription API to create the subscription. If you create subscriptions with the "Manage Subscriptions" app, there is currently only the workaround to add them manually in the subscription items.

entry.title: Re: Hey! Have you heard of SAP University Alliances// SAP Next-Gen?
entry.content:
Thanks dear David for the question! 

 

To start with, students could spread the word with their professors and also with their peers, e.g. about our coming SAP Business Processes Open Lecture, a weekly session open exclusively for students and professors around the world, to learn, interact and network, while preparing for a certification. 

Besides that, students could share with their academics at their Education Institution about the importance for them of learning SAP skills while studying and share our webpage  and connect them with us, e.g. sending us an email to sapnextgen@sap.com 

What do you think? 

Looking forward!

entry.title: Re: Disable Custom Field in VA02
entry.content:
Yes, I've used BADI sd_sls_fieldprop_item, method IF_SD_SLS_FIELDPROP_ITEM~SET_FIELD_PROP to set the fields ineditable.

Regards,
Victor

entry.title: No Editions Avaliable on GL account crreation in SAP MDG
entry.content:
Hi,

Warning Message is Triggering "No Editions Avaliable"  on GL account crreation in SAP MDG. Anyone have idea and give solutions to avoid this message.  Provide me solution. Thanks in Advance to team.

Thanks&Regards,

ChiyaanRavi

entry.title: Re: cannot assign partOf item [....] since it already bel...
entry.content: In your case, you made up an relation (entry - cart) which can be done only once (setting the owner) and tried to do the same again. Depending on which entity the information is set, you must first remove the entity entirely, create it again and set the owner again. Somehow there are operations, which can only be done once.

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2024 Contest
entry.content: @robinthakral - Joining the group is your registration.  It will show in the gameboard within one working day of joining. We have to manually load the registrations and only do so once a day.

entry.title: SAP Signavio License Types
entry.content:
Is there a document and/or asset which clearly outlines the SAP Signavio license types / options for the different components, their permissions and whether there is a cost associated?

For eg, if an organisation wishes to grant 'viewer' or 'read only' access to its employees (so not to actively edit or collaborate/comment) to view process diagrams, do these employees require a Collaboration Hub license? If so, is the license free? Would all such users need to be set up under user management? Would they require an S-ID to access, or is their email address sufficient? Is there a limit to the number of users that can be granted access?

In an organisation where, for example, existing process model diagrams are stored on a sharepoint site, to which hundreds, if not thousands of employees may have 'read only' access - how would this be handled in the event of a future move to SAP Signavio? Is it expected that the process diagrams would be exported once again to a sharepoint site?  Thanks in advance for the clarification.

entry.title: Re: How to list users group with sap bo rest api?
entry.content:
is not possible with RESTful, you have to delete the user from each group he belongs to individually

DELETE http://<baseURL>/v1/usergroups/<usergroup_id>/users

see  Removing Users from a User Group

entry.title: Re: Chrome v129 is bugged with $batch odata calls. Previe...
entry.content:
Edge is also based on Chromium, so if they fix it for Chrome, it's fixed in Edge as well.

For now use the UI5 inspector in Chrome / Edge

https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/sdk/#/topic/76e789ea418a48a1a27916b63a30fb72

entry.title: Re: Internal batch number not assigning while posting MIGO
entry.content:
Hello @Arrikar_Group 

For Batch Management there is 2 configuration activities 

Define Batch Number Ranges by Plant
Define Batch Number Ranges 

 

The Configuration Activity Define Batch Number Ranges ( BATCH_CLT) needs to be maintained 

with an internal number range ( 01 )

 

If this is setup correctly on your system then please raise a ticket with SAP Support so we can check the

example directly 

 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: Re: Internal batch number not assigning while posting MIGO
entry.content: adding tag SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Manufacturing

entry.title: Re: SAP Inside Track Munich 2024 (#sitMUC) - Secure Your Spot Now!
entry.content: @gregorw Would there be parking facilities available?

entry.title: Re: Clarification on Dynamic Field Addition and Runtime R...
entry.content:
Hi Anna,

Yes can add formulae and other CR objects in .NET.

What you look for is the *Controller using RAS

CrystalDecisions.ReportAppServer.Controllers.FormulaFieldControllerClass

Work would be get all Formula fields using ForNext()

Then Clone the collection then FormulaField.Add

Same for any other object.

To get you started download my example test app:

how-to-parameters-in-crystal-reports-for-visual-studio-net

You can see in the drop downlist box for objects how to get them and display them, modify to use the .Add() function

Go here to get the API reference Guide:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/crystalreports/3354091173.html

Don

entry.title: Re: Unable to extend E_JournalEntryItem with association
entry.content: that view is for extending additional fields, not for association.

entry.title: Re: Close individual SKF from posting
entry.content:
@LJT_UHN 

Hello , What is a SKF ? If it uses a Product Master Record , have you tried using the Material Status field for blocking ?

 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: Re: Equivalent APP on SAP Hana cloud Public of transactio...
entry.content:
Dear Sahil,

thank you for your reply. The proposed BADI could be a solution if we need to create the Billing Document with reference to the Sales Order or Delivery. The proposed BADI does not work if we have to create the Billing Document with reference to the Preliminary Billing Document. We would like to know if there are other ways to solve our issue. 

Thank you,

Irina

entry.title: How can I reshedule a meeting with Exxon Mobil

entry.title: Report to find authorized Fiori apps for user's in SAP S/4HANA On-premise system
entry.content:
Dear All,

Is there a standard report available that provides a list of all authorized Fiori applications for a specific user? I have tried using tcode: /ui2/flc, but it doesn't seem relevant. I also checked the AGR_BUFFI table, but the data does not match the authorized applications.

Could you please assist me with this?

Thank you!

entry.title: Successor Notifications
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Is there any way a notification can be sent out from the SuccessFactors system to either Managers or HRBP's in case Successor does not exists for any of their employee? Is there any standard notification mechanism in place in SuccessFactors Succession Module?

We are trying to track those employees for whom there is NO Successor in the system so that we can notify their Managers or HRBP's for required action.

Please let us know.

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Techtoberfest 2024
entry.content: Here is the glimpse of my workspace where i attend most of devtoberfest session 2024.

entry.title: How to use cl_gui_alv_tree->add_node correctly?
entry.content:
Hi, experts.
How to use cl_gui_alv_tree->add_node correctly?
For example i have 10 nodes to add and then use 'for event item_double_click of cl_gui_alv_tree' and display different ALV, with different fieldcatalogs and different tables.
Now i use this logic.

 

 ls_layo-exp_image ='@FQ@'.
    ls_layo-n_image = '@FQ@'.
    gs_fieldcat-name =  lines( tab_of_vblen_status ).
    call method obj_tree->add_node
      exporting
        i_relat_node_key = p_relat_key
        i_relationship   = cl_gui_column_tree=>relat_last_child
        i_node_text      = 'Загрузка на портал'
        is_node_layout   = ls_layo
        is_outtab_line   = gs_fieldcat
      importing
        e_new_node_key   = p_node_key.
    methods : item_double_click
                  for event item_double_click of cl_gui_alv_tree
                  importing node_key fieldname.

 

 

 

 method item_double_click.

    w_variant-report = sy-repid.
    ls_layout-cwidth_opt = 'X'.
    ls_layout-grid_title = ''.
    sel_node_key = node_key.
    case node_key.
      when text-001 or text-002 or text-005 or text-004.
        init=>init_container( ).
        ls_layout-sel_mode = 'A'.
        init=>init_fieldcat( ).
        init=>create_alv_and_display( ).

      when text-003 or text-006 or text-007 or text-008 or text-009.
        init=>init_container( ).
        ls_layout-sel_mode = 'X'.
        init=>init_fieldcat(  ).
        init=>create_alv_and_display( ).
    endcase.

 

 

But what if in future i would be needed to add additional node at position '5', i would need to rewrite all the logic for nodes from 5 to end.
How to do it correctly? I don't want to do it. How forseen it, to not change all the logic?What i can check, when node is doubleclicked?

entry.title: Re: SAP DI Pipeline getting failed intermittently
entry.content:
Hello,

Check this SAP Note 3260800

Regards

SS

entry.title: Re: Work Zone My Inbox / Task Center: solution to get Ope...
entry.content: That should indeed work, but it will break local use of My Inbox.

entry.title: Base taxonomy 2024 for ESEF scenario in SAP DM
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts,

I would like to ask when the new base taxonomy (base_2024  - based on ESMA ESEF Taxonomy 2023) for ESEF scenario in SAP DM will be released. Customers are starting to ask for new annual periods; I checked in SAP Note 2827882 - DM - How to get ESEF taxonomy files, where usually base taxonomies were stored, but I found only previous versions.

Thanks a lot in advance.

Andrea

entry.title: package errors due to missing usage in BASIS package.
entry.content:
Hi,

we generate end user pfcg roles in target system. Basis is a transported template role which is copied. Restricted access to resources is defined by adding dedicated values to org levels.

We use the objects from BASIS package like type suid_tt_agr_texts for the role tests, cl_pfcg_role_factory to get the handler class for roles.

The package interface does not allow the usage of these objects. A reasonable measure.

If we change the usage accesses of the related package in BASIS (e.g. S_PROFGEN_API), is this a modification? Will it be overwritten with a new Service package? Is there any other option to avoid anoying exemption handling in our landscape?

Zeno

entry.title: Re: Close individual SKF from posting
entry.content: skf's are statistical Key figures and they are used to track statistical information.  They do not have an option in our system to lock specific items just to delete the entire skf.  The deletion can only be used if no transactions have occurred.

entry.title: Re: Consume Ariba APIs using Postman
entry.content: Very useful, thanks for sharing.

entry.title: Re: FBL5N-Add button
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
I am implementing the addition of a function button in the standard application bar of the alv resulting from the transaction FBL5N.
In se41, program SAPLFI_ITEMS, status GRID_ITEMS_AR, I chose the function code +CUS01. And I modified and activated the descriptive text. I generated the status too but the button +CUS01 still does not appear.

In se19, I created the BADI ZFI_ITEMS_MENUE01 from 'FI_ITEMS_MENUE01'.
Could you please tell me the code to put in the methods LIST_ITEMS01, LIST_ITEMS02, LIST_ITEMS03, LIST_ITEMS04,
SHOW_BUTTONS or what to do?
The goal is to see the button associated with the function code +cus01 appear in the ALV application bar of the tc FBL5N.

Thank you in advance for your help.

entry.title: Re: Work Zone My Inbox / Task Center: solution to get Ope...
entry.content: Do you want to use the My Inbox in local flp and workzone? In that case, a redirection page (could be plain old bsp) which redirects to the right place based on the type of launchpad.

entry.title: Re: Work Zone My Inbox / Task Center: solution to get Open Task to generate a URL accessible through
entry.content: we embed fiori elements object page as approval screen, I don't see there is any configuration needed when running in workzone and local

entry.title: Re: Step by Step instruction to Setup / Update IAS User Passwords in Mass using Postman
entry.content:
Hello, @yashkhanna, thank you for the guide!
However, I'm getting this error: Successful POST request | AssertionError: expected 503 to be one of [ 200, 201 ]
I think I've set everything up correctly but I'm still getting this error, and in the response body in the console this is what it displays: “No server is available to handle request for this tenant , or the application is temporarily down for maintenance. Excuse us for the inconvenience.”
Could you help me to find out what could be the origin of the error?
Thanks

entry.title: Re: Plant Vs. Storage Location: Best practices and the decision matrix
entry.content:
Thank you @RaviDave for this post.

If we consider invoicing to customers/vendors as a criterion for setting up best practice enterprise structure. At what level can invoicing be done on SAP? Would it be at the plant or storage location? Also, what is the possibility of invoicing to be done at the storage location level and not at the plant level if there is a requirement for invoicing to customers to be done from the storage location where the stock was loaded from?

entry.title: Re: Asset Retirement - Multiple Assets
entry.content: This process does not work for sub assets.

entry.title: FocusBuild - TOCs not imported immediately
entry.content:
Hello,

i do not know whether this is even the right place to ask the question but i am completely stuck.

We are using FocusBuild to manage transports in the three tier landscape. I have to admit i barely know anything about FocusBuild. It was done by an external consultant we no longer employ.

Anyway, coworkers are complaining that TOC contained in transport documents are not transported immediately when they set the request as "to be tested". I searched the net and consulted severals AIs for hours, but all i got was that FB MAY not imported TOC immediately if it is configured to do so. But i didn't find anything about FB or SolMans "special treatment".

 

Hence my questions:
Does FocusBuild \ SolMan really treat TOC differently than customizing or workbench request ?
Where do i find the configuration to check ?
And where do i find any documentation regarding FBs treatment of TOC ?

Any help is appreciated.

 

Regards

Andre

entry.title: Re: GUI Status repairing doesn't work
entry.content:
hello,

Can you tell me what code abap you use to insert a descritiption for fcode +cus01. fc +cus01 don't apper in my application toolbar for FBL5N ALV

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Techtoberfest 2024
entry.content: Four laptops? I would understand four Monitors, but four laptops? 🤯

entry.title: Re: No active version available for index 0000
entry.content:
Hi Griselda,

I saw this question a long time ago without an answer and I had the same problem. I will leave it registered to help others in case they also have this problem.
This is a missing inflation index version in Inflationary Accounting.
Transaction: ORFA (Customizing)
Special assessments >> fixed asset appreciation/depreciation >> Indexed replacement values ​​>> Balance sheet valuations >> Inflationary Accounting >> Update inflation index

Enter a version for the index in the field

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Techtoberfest 2024
entry.content: 3 of them client requirement due to project data and another 1 is my personal laptop. :).Assigned to multiple projects.

entry.title: Re: Unable to extend E_JournalEntryItem with association
entry.content: Hmm well that is sub-optimal 😉 Was there any way I could have seen this beforehand?

entry.title: How to populate the data from HRIS portlet to MDF portlet
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

I need to populate the cost center as and when created in Job Information (HRIS) with date in Alternative Cost Distribution Portlet (MDF) with date. 

 

Thanks & Regards, 

Ashwani Gupta

entry.title: Re: Introducing the Background Processing Framework
entry.content:
Hi @mkroencke ,

I think I am facing the same problem as you. While working on a bgPF code (debugging it and aborting some executions), sometimes the debugger is triggered randomly and stops at breakpoints inside the bgPF code, even though I haven't manually re-called the bgPF.

Did you get any more information regarding this issue?

Regards,
Andrés

entry.title: requires a valid tax code good receipt
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am encountering an issue when trying to perform a goods receipt based on a purchase order. When I select the supplier, I receive the following error.

Could you please assist me with this?

entry.title: Re: Error in SAP Build apps Build service 4.11.167
entry.content: exactly the same problem since 27.09.24

entry.title: Re: requires a valid tax code good receipt
entry.content: Enter a valid tax code

entry.title: Re: Unable to extend E_JournalEntryItem with association
entry.content: just extend I_JournalEntryItem for new association

entry.title: Re: Custom Situation Cases: Configure Your Own Use Cases (1/6)
entry.content:
Hi,

Great set of blogs. I have a question: We are going to create a custom situation scenario for the first time, one of the requirements we had was that in specific conditions a notification should be displayed on the launchpad of one user, not multiple. This is something that confuses me as we'll need to work with teams.

Thanks and regards

entry.title: PlanningCalendarRow binding aggregations for nonWorkingPeriods
entry.content:
We have a scenario where PlanningCalendarRow should display nonWorkingPeriods, which is a part of UI5 version 1.128.x, the nonWorkingPeriods are an aggregation on PlanningCalendarRow similar to appointments.

https://sapui5nightly.int.sap.eu2.hana.ondemand.com/1.128.0/#/api/sap.m.PlanningCalendarRow%23overview

In our setup, we use bindAggregation method to bind appointment aggregation to the Row and similar is to be done for nonWorkingPeriods. But the issue I am facing is that there exists a nested aggregation TimeRange within nonWorkingPeriods, the structure is as follows:

nonWorkingPeriods:
[{
"recurrenceType": "Daily",
"recurrencePattern": "1",
"recurrenceEndDate": reccEndDate,
"timeRange": {
"start": "00:00",
"end": "08:00",
"valueFormat": "HH:mm"
},
"date": reccDate
}]
 
Therefore, it would be helpful if a sample can be provided to implement nested aggregations using planningCalendarRow.bindAggregation().
 
Best regards
Ahad

entry.title: Re: Issue with Large Data Extraction from SAP B1 via SAP DataSphere: Socket Closed Error
entry.content: Hi..May be the size of the records... Just try to extract with less number of records by applying any filter if any

entry.title: Account country duplicated in C4C
entry.content:
For two customers who were manually uploaded to C4C PRD, the country line is duplicated within their customer account data. 

For the first account the line is duplicated three times, whereas for the second account the line is duplicated twice.

So far, we have not been able to edit the upload file sufficiently to remove this. And we also could not remove these duplicate lines from the account data directly.

Could you please help us identifying the reason why the country is duplicated and how to remove it?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Account country duplicated in C4C
entry.content:
Hello,

 

Usually in such scenarios, if you go to adaptation mode > click on country field > in adaptation go back and scroll, you will see some additional Addresses fields like "Address Line 1", "Address Line 2" and etc. If you enable them (in case they are hidden), you will see the Country value is filled there.

Please avoid filling the 'Address Line' or any additional address fields in future when uploading/importing to C4C system. Please use the standard fields Country, street, city and so on. 

 

For more details please refer to our KBA 3507905 - Account Country value field is duplicated in C4C

entry.title: Get performance of the SAP Hybris database
entry.content:
Hello,

I have following question - how can I get the performance of the database for specifc query in SAP hybris? For instance, let's say that I make a call to an endpoint that returns an item with values it gets from other items, based on relations between them. I want to be able to get total number of queries executed to the database for my search, as well as time it took to get them done, then return it in the response - something like this:

"@performance": {
    "queryCount": 3, // number of queries executed
    "queryTime": 247, // number of miiliseconds it took to run all queries, this is a sum
    "serverTime": 323 // number of milliseconds the server need to process all this.
}

 Does Hybris provide a way to count performance in such way?

entry.title: Re: Generative AI with SAP – Part 1: Introduction to SAP Business AI
entry.content: Thanks for putting this together.

entry.title: Re: Fixed Asset acquisition in IFRS only in new asset acc...
entry.content:
Hello @ashwnc try one of below approach.

1. Post ledger specific transaction using AB01L OR

2. Follow unilateral asset https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/unilateral-asset-how-does-it-work/qaq-p/12297643

Regards,
Sumesh Gupta

entry.title: SAPUI5 Component.getRouter() does not exist
entry.content:
Hello, I'm working on a TypeScript SAPUI5 app, in a table I need to route the user on the Object Page linked to the row.

Unfortunately, in the view controller when I want to get the Router to proceed with routing, i'm struck with an error: `Property 'getRouter' does not exist on type 'Component'.`

Here's the code : 

onSessionPress(oEvent: any): void {
        const oItem = oEvent.getSource();
        const sSessionID = oItem.getBindingContext().getProperty("ID");
        const oRouter = this.getOwnerComponent()?.getRouter();
        
        oRouter.navTo("SessionObjectPage", {
            ID: sSessionID
        });
    }

In the manifest.json, the routing is defined like this:

"routing": {
      "routes": [
        {
          "name": "SessionsSessionsListPage",
          "pattern": ":?query:",
          "target": "SessionsSessionsListPage"
        },
        {
          "name": "SessionsSessionObjectPage",
          "pattern": "Sessions({SessionsKey}):?query:",
          "target": "SessionsSessionObjectPage"
        }
      ],
      "targets": {
        "SessionsSessionsListPage": {
          "type": "Component",
          "id": "SessionsSessionsListPage",
          "name": "sap.fe.core.fpm",
          "options": {
            "settings": {
              "viewName": "raceanalysis.ext.view.SessionsListPage",
              "contextPath": "/Sessions",
              "navigation": {
                "Sessions": {
                  "detail": {
                    "route": "SessionsSessionObjectPage"
                  }
                }
              }
            }
          }
        },
        "SessionsSessionObjectPage": {
          "type": "Component",
          "id": "SessionsSessionObjectPage",
          "name": "sap.fe.core.fpm",
          "options": {
            "settings": {
              "viewName": "raceanalysis.ext.view.SessionObjectPage",
              "contextPath": "/Sessions"
            }
          }
        }
      },
      "config": {}
    }

The only issue remotely similar I found is this: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/navigation-problem/qaq-p/11609343  . But it's quite old and didn't found a clear answer.

Any help is appreciated !

entry.title: Re: Work Zone My Inbox / Task Center: solution to get Ope...
entry.content:
SAP has replied via a case: the easiest solution that doesn't require changing any individual task configuration is to specify to use the Work Zone runtime-destination specific hostname of the backend system for WDA applications. 

We have tested it and it works. We will follow this recommendation, but it's good to note that it also breaks the use of "local" My Inbox.

For customers that have use cases to use Work Zone and Fiori Launchpad side-by-side, changing the task configuration from WDA to intent-based navigation should work. The class responsible for generating the Open Task URL (CL_SWF_UTL_URL_INTENT) will only return the hash-fragment and thus can work in either environment.

entry.title: Re: Disabling TaaS When Creating a Sales Document Using DI API
entry.content: We are encountering the same exact error when trying to update sales orders via the DI API. We can manually make the change to the same sales order in the UI, but when trying to perform the update in the DI API, we get the "999901000 - Cannot call the Electronic Document Service. Contact technical support." error. If we turn TaaS off, the update via DI API works as well. We are using SAP B1 10.0 FP2208.
